conditions.critical_condition_basis: co-elution of homopolymers with different molar masses
conditions.evidence_text: The critical conditions for the P(POPA) homopolymers were at 25 °C at the mobile phase composition of THF: ACN = 15.6:84.4 vol %. The P(POPA) homopolymers with different molar masses co-eluted on the PSDVB reverse stationary phase at a temperature of 25 °C were determined to be at the THF/ACN mobile phase composition of 15.6:84.4 vol %.
conditions.notes: Used for LCCC analysis of copolymers where P(POPA) is the critical component.
conditions.physical_address: Faculty of Materials Science and Engineering, South China University of Technology, Guangzhou 510641, P. R. China; Department of Polymer Chemistry and Technology, National Institute of Chemistry, Ljubljana SI1000, Slovenia

conditions.evidence_text: LCCC on the PS-DVB Reverse Stationary Phase... separation of the copolymers at critical conditions for P(POPA)... The critical conditions at which the P(POPA) homopolymers with different molar masses co-eluted on the PSDVB reverse stationary phase at a temperature of 25 °C were determined to be at the THF/ACN mobile phase composition of 15.6:84.4 vol %.
conditions.notes: Analytical LCCC used to study microstructure influence; P(POPA) is at critical condition, separation governed by PPO molar mass and microstructure.
conditions.physical_address: Faculty of Materials Science and Engineering, South China University of Technology, Guangzhou 510641, P. R. China; Department of Polymer Chemistry and Technology, National Institute of Chemistry, Ljubljana SI1000, Slovenia

conditions.evidence_text: LCCC Coupled with a Multidetection System (UVMALS-RI). Isocratic LCCC/UV-MALS-RI experiments under critical conditions for the P(POPA) were performed under the same conditions as LCCC... The composition of the mobile phase (v/v %) in the first dimension was THF/ACN = 15.6:84.4 vol % and the flow rate was set to 0.04 mL min-1. The experiments were run at 25 °C
conditions.notes: LCCC coupled with multidetection (UV-MALS-RI) for molar mass determination as a function of elution volume.
conditions.physical_address: Faculty of Materials Science and Engineering, South China University of Technology, Guangzhou 510641, P. R. China; Department of Polymer Chemistry and Technology, National Institute of Chemistry, Ljubljana SI1000, Slovenia

conditions.evidence_text: Two-Dimensional Liquid Chromatography (LCCC × SEC 2D-LC). The column used in the first LCCC dimension was PS-DVB... The composition of the mobile phase (v/v %) in the first dimension was THF/ACN = 15.6:84.4 vol % and the flow rate was set to 0.04 mL min-1. The experiments were run at 25 °C
conditions.notes: First dimension of 2D-LC (LCCC x SEC) used for analytical characterization of microstructure and molar mass distribution.
conditions.physical_address: Faculty of Materials Science and Engineering, South China University of Technology, Guangzhou 510641, P. R. China; Department of Polymer Chemistry and Technology, National Institute of Chemistry, Ljubljana SI1000, Slovenia
